description: Open Library trending books page showing recently added books to community bookshelves, with book covers, titles, authors, series info, edition counts, and availability status.

fields.name: title_link
fields.description: Relative URL to the book's work page with edition key

fields.name: author_link
fields.description: Relative URL to the author's page

fields.name: series_name
fields.description: Series name if the book belongs to a series

fields.name: cover_image
fields.description: URL of the book cover image

fields.name: first_published
fields.description: Year the book was first published

fields.name: activity_timestamp
fields.description: Text indicating when someone last marked activity on the book (e.g. 'Someone marked as Want to Read 40 seconds ago')

fields.name: cta_button_text
fields.description: Primary call-to-action button label (e.g. Read, Borrow, Locate, Preview Only, Checked Out)

fields.name: cta_button_link
fields.description: URL for the primary call-to-action button

pagination.notes: Pagination is handled by a custom web component <ol-pagination> with attributes current-page='1' and total-pages='10'. URL pattern likely follows /trending/now?page={n}
